vocab.meaning: một thánh đường học vấn (nơi an toàn và kích thích học tập)
vocab.example: To me, my primary school was a sanctuary of learning where I felt completely shielded from the outside world.

vocab.meaning: phát triển toàn diện (thể chất, trí tuệ, tinh thần)
vocab.example: The curriculum was meticulously designed to prioritize holistic development rather than just academic attainment.

vocab.meaning: thấm nhuần tinh thần kỷ luật
vocab.example: While strict, the teachers managed to instil a sense of discipline in us that has served me well in adulthood.

vocab.meaning: sự hỗ trợ kiên định/không lay chuyển
vocab.example: I was fond of my school because of the unwavering support from the faculty, especially when I struggled with mathematics.

vocab.meaning: những kỷ niệm sống động/rõ nét
vocab.example: I still retain vivid memories of the sprawling playground where we spent countless hours during recess.

vocab.meaning: một chút tính cách/tinh thần cạnh tranh
vocab.example: The school's house system encouraged a healthy competitive streak among students during annual events.
I deeply appreciated the progressive pedagogical approach that favoured hands-on experiments over rote learning.

vocab.meaning: những tình bạn bền vững/lâu dài
vocab.example: The most cherished aspect of my schooling was the long-lasting friendships I forged in that environment.

vocab.meaning: cơ sở vật chất hiện đại bậc nhất
vocab.example: We were quite privileged to have access to state-of-the-art facilities, including a massive library and high-tech labs.

vocab.meaning: bàn đạp cho (thành công hoặc sự phát triển sau này)
vocab.example: I view my early education as a springboard for my later academic achievements and personal growth.
